name: PyTorch DDP On Slurm
summary: Launch and verify PyTorch distributed data parallel jobs on Slurm.
description: This skill provides a conservative Slurm smoke test for PyTorch DistributedDataParallel environments, including rank variables, GPU visibility, process group initialization, and a small all-reduce check.

inputs.name: gpu_partition
inputs.description: Slurm partition or queue that provides GPU nodes.

inputs.name: nodes
inputs.description: Number of nodes to use for the smoke test.

inputs.name: gpus_per_node
inputs.description: Number of GPUs requested per node.

inputs.name: pytorch_environment
inputs.description: Module, virtual environment, Conda environment, or container that provides PyTorch.

outputs.name: ddp_smoke_report
outputs.description: Rank, device, backend, and all-reduce output captured from the Slurm job.

outputs.name: environment_report
outputs.description: Python, PyTorch, CUDA availability, and selected Slurm variables.

examples.title: Submit a PyTorch DDP smoke test

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Submit to a short GPU partition with a known PyTorch environment and confirm every rank reports the expected world size and all-reduce value.
